policy.title: Git Branching and Release Procedures
policy.summary: Outlines the branching naming conventions, code reviews, and release deployment schedule.
policy.section: We follow GitFlow. Developers must create feature branches off the 'develop' branch. Feature branch naming conventions are: feature/[issue-number]-short-description. Direct commits to 'develop' or 'main' are blocked by branch protection rules.

Every Pull Request (PR) requires at least two approvals from senior engineers. The build pipeline must pass all automated test gates, including a 90% code coverage threshold, before a PR can be merged.

Releases to the production cluster occur bi-weekly on Wednesday mornings at 5:00 AM UTC. Deployment coordination is managed by the Release Engineer, Thomas Lee, who can be reached at thomas.lee@auratech.com or desk phone 555-013-1122.
